title: Bring Back Anvil Dupe
description: this mod/plugin brings back the old 1.17 anvil breaking shulker dupe glitch back.
body:
this mod brings back the old 1.17 anvil break dupe glitch back so you can relive the old memories and make a knockoff unstable smp video and do whatever you want

THIS IS A SERVER-SIDE MOD!!!

### **HOW TO DUPE:**

1:have your inventory full

2:rename shulker with an anvil thats about to break

3:rename shulker until it breaks

4:enjoy
